Implants · Ahmedabad · 2026

Dental Implant Cost in Ahmedabad (2026)

Everything you need to know about dental implants in Ahmedabad — costs, procedure and what to expect.

Dr. Siddharth Mehta
BDS MDS · Implant & Laser Dentist, Ahmedabad
📍 Shyamal Cross Road, Ahmedabad 🕐 5 min read 🦷 Expert Dental Article

How Much Does a Dental Implant Cost in Ahmedabad?

Professional dental consultation — Dr. Siddharth's Dental Care, Ahmedabad

If you are missing one or more teeth and live in Ahmedabad, dental implants are very likely the best long-term solution. A single dental implant in Ahmedabad typically costs between ₹25,000 and ₹60,000 depending on the brand, complexity and whether a bone graft is needed.

💡 At Dr. Siddharth's Dental Care, we use premium implant systems with CBCT 3D-guided placement for maximum precision at our Shyamal Cross Road clinic, Ahmedabad.

What is included in the cost?

  • CBCT 3D scan and digital treatment planning
  • Titanium implant post (surgical placement)
  • Healing abutment
  • Custom porcelain crown
  • All follow-up appointments
Modern dental implant procedure — state of the art equipment

Why are implants worth the investment?

Unlike a bridge (which requires grinding down healthy teeth) or dentures (which slip), implants are a permanent, lifetime solution. They fuse with your jawbone, look completely natural, and require no special maintenance.

Am I a candidate?

  • You have one or more missing teeth
  • Your gums are healthy
  • Sufficient jawbone density (confirmed by CBCT scan)
  • Non-smoker or willing to stop before surgery
Dental X-ray review — CBCT imaging for implant planning

Dr. Siddharth will assess your case and give you a clear treatment plan and cost estimate.
